title: Portable AI Presentation Generation OS
creator: Agent Buildprint
summary: Clean-room, Presenton-inspired Buildprint for a self-hosted AI presentation generator and API with prompt/document-to-deck generation, provider configuration, editable slides, assets, templates, export, webhooks, and desktop/MCP boundaries.
plainDescription: A mapped-project blueprint for building a source-independent AI presentation generation system: authenticated self-hosted app, configurable LLM/image providers, document and prompt ingestion, outline/slide generation, editor/chat iteration, PPTX/PDF export, and API/webhook integration.
promise: A selected, unqualified execution packet for rebuilding the Presenton product shape without copying source or claiming exact clone/provider/export parity before proof.
whatYouGet: Prompt/document ingestion and outline generation contract
whatYouNeed: Provider keys only for optional live mode
risks: Unsafe document upload or path traversal
Webhook SSRF or silent delivery failure
checks: Source evidence mapped from Presenton README, FastAPI routers, generation services, Next.js pages, export/webhook/MCP/desktop surfaces
Claim status remains SELECTED_UNQUALIFIED until target-app proof exists

trustBadges.label: Mapped from Presenton
trustBadges.detail: Primary source is presenton/presenton at commit cd6b0ac1c7ea9fa8f385c766fb900a08e1c2299b; source is evidence, not runtime dependency.

trustBadges.label: Executable packet
trustBadges.detail: BUILDPRINT.md owns read order; setup, phase, evaluation, and evidence files are included.

trustBadges.label: Explicit proof boundary
trustBadges.detail: Selected output is unqualified until provider, browser, persistence, export, API, security, and no-fake proofs pass.

publicStatus.label: Mapped packet
publicStatus.explanation: Source-independent Presenton mapping packet generated and packet/publication checks pass; implementation proof still required.

copyPrompt: Use the Portable AI Presentation Generation OS executable Buildprint. Start from BUILDPRINT.md, then follow 01-questions.md, 02-project-setup.md, blueprint.yaml, 03-phases/phase-index.yaml, the active phase file, 04-evaluation.md, and 05-evidence/evidence-ledger.jsonl. First bootstrap exact snapshots: agb start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/portable-ai-presentation-generation-os/package.json . If agb is not installed, clone https://github.com/DomEscobar/agent-buildprint and run node agent-buildprint/bin/agb.js start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/portable-ai-presentation-generation-os/package.json . Then read .buildprint/next-agent.md and continue. Build a source-independent AI presentation generator/API with auth, provider config, prompt/document ingestion, outline and slide generation, media/templates/themes, editor/chat iteration, PPTX/PDF export, API/webhook/MCP boundaries, and strict provider/secret/upload/export safety. Do not claim exact Presenton clone or production-ready parity until evidence gates pass.
